title: M Message
text: M Message Convert error code to error text. Modes None. Conditions None. Description This request provides Uniface with a string that contains the error message text corresponding to a connector error code or a DBMS error code. The Message request must be successful, if necessary by supplying a default error message text. Connector requests can provide Uniface with connector error codes as well as DBMS error codes. In the Message request, the connector can translate a DBMS error code to text by querying a DBMS system table or a static table of messages in the connector. Refer to: Uniface Database I/O Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
